$comment: Golden prompts for trigger evaluation. Scoring: PASS = every skills_all present, ≥1 of each non-empty *_any group observed, nothing in forbid observed. Default fixture is a Vite+React SPA (see fixtures/); `fixture: next|astro` scopes a prompt to a framework overlay (run with --fixture next / --fixture astro).
